notion_tool.label: Notion
notion_tool.description: Create pages, update tasks, or search workspace content using Orchestrate-powered flows.
notion_tool.unlock_message: ✅ Notion unlocked! Set your API key with: set_credentials notion_tool
notion_tool.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Combine Notion with outline_editor for powerful documentation workflows

outline_editor.label: Outline Editor
outline_editor.description: Create and manage structured documents in Outline. Perfect for wikis, docs, and knowledge bases.
outline_editor.unlock_message: ✅ Outline Editor unlocked! Set your API key with: set_credentials outline_editor
outline_editor.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Use outline_editor with claude_assistant for autonomous documentation

mem_tool.label: Mem
mem_tool.description: Capture personal insights and notes, syncing them into your Mem workspace automatically.
mem_tool.unlock_message: ✅ Mem unlocked! Set your API key with: set_credentials mem_tool
mem_tool.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Use mem_tool for quick capture, then review in your Mem workspace

readwise_tool.label: Readwise
readwise_tool.description: Import and explore highlights from your synced Readwise library. Search across all your book notes.
readwise_tool.unlock_message: ✅ Readwise unlocked! Set your API key with: set_credentials readwise_tool
readwise_tool.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Search your highlights with semantic queries for instant recall

buffer_engine.label: Buffer Engine
buffer_engine.description: Schedule and auto-publish content to social media. Queue posts, manage campaigns, track engagement.
buffer_engine.unlock_message: ✅ Buffer Engine unlocked! Set your Twitter credentials with: set_credentials buffer_engine
buffer_engine.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Combine with ideogram_tool for automated visual content

ideogram_tool.label: Ideogram
ideogram_tool.description: Generate beautiful AI-driven images for documents, social posts, or presentations.
ideogram_tool.unlock_message: ✅ Ideogram unlocked! Set your API key with: set_credentials ideogram_tool
ideogram_tool.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Use with buffer_engine to create and schedule visual content

automation_engine.label: Automation Engine
automation_engine.description: Event-driven automation for triggering workflows based on file changes, schedules, and custom events.
automation_engine.unlock_message: ✅ Automation Engine unlocked! Create rules with: add_rule
automation_engine.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Set up automations to run tasks while you sleep

github_tool_universal.label: GitHub
github_tool_universal.description: Manage repos, commits, and pushes to GitHub directly from OrchestrateOS.
github_tool_universal.unlock_message: ✅ GitHub unlocked! Set your access token with: set_credentials github_tool_universal
github_tool_universal.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Combine with claude_assistant for autonomous code commits

nylasinbox.label: Nylas Inbox
nylasinbox.description: Read, send, and manage emails directly inside your system using structured API control.
nylasinbox.unlock_message: ✅ Nylas Inbox unlocked! Set your credentials with: set_credentials nylasinbox
nylasinbox.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Unlock convertkit_tool next to automate your email marketing workflows

convertkit_tool.label: ConvertKit
convertkit_tool.description: Create, update, and analyze email broadcasts and subscriber activity inside OrchestrateOS.
convertkit_tool.unlock_message: ✅ ConvertKit unlocked! Set your credentials with: set_credentials convertkit_tool
convertkit_tool.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Use with nylasinbox for complete email workflow automation

gamma_tool.label: Gamma
gamma_tool.description: Generate slide decks automatically from structured text using the Gamma API – no design skills needed.
gamma_tool.unlock_message: ✅ Gamma unlocked! Set your API key with: set_credentials gamma_tool
gamma_tool.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Tip: Combine with outline_editor to turn documents into presentations

claude_assistant.label: Claude Assistant
claude_assistant.description: AUTONOMOUS TASK EXECUTION - Assign complex tasks and Claude executes them while you sleep. Requires Claude Pro/Team subscription.
claude_assistant.unlock_message:
🎉 Claude Assistant unlocked! Run the auth script to connect your Claude subscription:

bash /Applications/OrchestrateOS.app/Contents/Resources/orchestrate/auth/setup_claude_auth.sh
claude_assistant.post_unlock_nudge: 💡 Power user tip: Claude Assistant + outline_editor = autonomous documentation workflows
